overall.description: First-person exploration of a cyberpunk night market in Night City (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring neon-lit food stalls, digital cherry blossom trees, and a massive multi-armed Buddha statue. The footage showcases ray-traced neon lighting reflecting off wet pavement as the player ascends from a covered market street to an elevated plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered cyberpunk market street with food stalls

events.description: moving past the initial food stall into the covered walkway with hanging lanterns
slight turn to the right approaching the vending machine area

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered market street lined with neon-lit food stalls and red paper lanterns

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the food stall counter wearing a blue shirt
pedestrian in dark clothing walking away from the camera

entered.detail: metal counter with cooking equipment and steam rising, staffed by a vendor
series of red cylindrical paper lanterns hanging in a row along the ceiling
dark wooden beam ceiling structure covering the walkway
blue vending machine with 'BIG' illuminated text and food advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a food stall in a covered cyberpunk market. The camera moves forward through a narrow walkway lined with red paper lanterns hanging overhead. A vendor stands behind the counter to the left, while pedestrians walk in the opposite direction. The wet pavement reflects the purple and cyan neon lights from the stalls.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with digital cherry blossom tree and vending machines

events.description: exiting the covered walkway into an open plaza with a large illuminated tree
circling around the digital cherry blossom tree to examine it from different angles

agents.ego_description: walking around the illuminated cherry blossom tree and exploring the plaza area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket and sunglasses walking past the camera

entered.detail: large artificial tree with glowing pink cherry blossoms and illuminated trunk
large vertical screen displaying animated advertisements with bright colors

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider plaza featuring a prominent digital cherry blossom tree glowing with pink light. The camera circles the tree, revealing more of the open space and surrounding market stalls. The BGC vending machine is now closer on the right, while the covered roof of the previous area recedes into the background. Pedestrians in futuristic clothing walk through the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow concrete stairwell with neon accent lighting

events.description: entering a dark narrow stairwell from the open plaza
approaching the top of stairs where bright teal and pink light becomes visible

agents.ego_description: climbing a long flight of concrete stairs flanked by purple neon light strips

entered.detail: long flight of concrete stairs ascending between dark walls
vertical purple neon light strips running along the stairwell wall
wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow, enclosed stairwell leaving the plaza behind. The concrete stairs ascend steeply, illuminated by purple neon strips mounted on the right wall. Graffiti covers the left wall, and a barrel fire burns at the bottom of the stairs. The environment is darker and more confined than the previous open areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated plaza with massive multi-armed statue and holographic displays

events.description: emerging from the stairwell into an elevated plaza with a massive statue visible ahead
tilting the camera upward to view the full height of the massive multi-armed statue against the skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: exploring the upper plaza, walking around the massive statue and looking up at its scale against the night sky

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white clothing walking across the upper plaza toward the statue

entered.detail: enormous bronze-colored statue with multiple arms in a prayer position, towering over the plaza
traditional Japanese-style curved roof with red trim and wooden beams
large floating holographic screens displaying product advertisements
geometric holographic shapes floating in the air above the plaza

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs, the scene reveals an elevated plaza dominated by a massive multi-armed Buddha-like statue towering against the night sky. The camera walks forward, passing under a traditional pagoda-style roof structure, then tilts upward to emphasize the statue's immense scale. Holographic advertisements and floating geometric shapes illuminate the area with cyan and pink light, while skyscrapers with neon signage rise in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic, neon-lit market street to a vast, elevated plaza dominated by a colossal statue. It begins by moving through a narrow covered walkway lined with red paper lanterns, where purple and cyan lights reflect off the wet pavement as pedestrians pass by. As the path opens, the camera circles a glowing digital cherry blossom tree in a wider plaza, leaving the covered roof behind while passing futuristic vending machines and crowds. The scene then shifts into a dark, confined concrete stairwell illuminated by purple neon strips and graffiti, ascending steeply away from a burning barrel. Finally, the camera emerges from the enclosure into an open upper terrace, passing under a pagoda roof before tilting upward to reveal a massive multi-armed Buddha statue towering against a backdrop of holographic advertisements and neon skyscrapers.
